laws.title: Mixed Content Warnings
laws.description: HTTP elements loaded over HTTPS connections.
laws.remediation: Ensure all content is served over HTTPS.

laws.title: Password Management
laws.description: No prompt for users to update weak passwords.
laws.remediation: Implement client-side prompts for users to upgrade weak passwords.

laws.title: Session Timeout
laws.description: Sessions do not expire on inactivity.
laws.remediation: Configure automatic session expiration after a defined period of inactivity.

laws.title: CSRF Protection
laws.remediation: Implement CSRF tokens on all form submissions.

laws.title: Form Input Validation
laws.remediation: Enhance server-side validation checks to complement client-side validation.
